title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 8th April 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Good choice; green division doing well, Telugu chairman doing an excellent job.
recommendations.detail: Buy all three (NLC India, Rainbow Hospitals, MTAR). NLC's green division is doing well now; presently a Telugu gentleman (Prasanna Kumar) is chairman doing an extremely good job.

recommendations.note: More resilient even in this fall; one of the better choices, no doubt.
recommendations.detail: Buy; Rainbow Hospital stocks have been more resilient even in this fall and are one of the better choices.

recommendations.note: Good choice; has even outperformed in this market.
recommendations.detail: Buy; MTAR has even outperformed in this market, we can observe.

recommendations.note: Exit on rallies; tested patience 5 years, no movement despite good news.
recommendations.detail: Exit when a rally comes, because there are good stocks. Yes Bank has been testing patience; in the last five years, however good the news, there has been no movement.

recommendations.note: Exit on rallies; recent fraud hits this quarter, but slightly better/investment-grade of the three.
recommendations.detail: IDFC has its own problems; the recent fraud will negatively impact this quarter's earnings season, so exit on rallies. Among the three it is the slightly better stock and can be viewed somewhat as investment-grade.

recommendations.note: Valuations high, trade-deal overhang; expensive, book profit on momentum.
recommendations.detail: Trident's valuations are high; the trade deal is an overhang; it's an expensive stock. In a bull market, book profit on consistent momentum.

recommendations.note: Hold; Q4 results will be good, stock very resilient with no selling.
recommendations.detail: Q4 results will be good (excellent numbers), nothing objectionable. The stock is very resilient and doesn't flinch; pharma broadly strong/defensive. Can be held.
